critic_raw:
Assessor A: Equalized odds and AUROC are credible but insufficient for this decision. Three missing pieces: full fairness evaluation (approval rates, disparate impact), portfolio loss verification, group calibration. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

Assessor B: Fair lending compliance in consumer credit requires calibrated probability estimates by group — otherwise adverse-action reasons may be inconsistent across groups. This is absent. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

Assessor C: The paper presents a strong model but an incomplete policy evaluation. The missing analyses are computable from existing data. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

Synthesis: Unanimous empirical_test_agreed, run 3.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous empirical_test_agreed across all three ensemble runs.

empirical_test.measure: portfolio expected loss, approval rates by protected group, group-level calibration
empirical_test.success_criterion: all three meet standards from retrospective data
empirical_test.failure_criterion: any metric fails its respective standard
